display.purpose: The verdict headline. One per results screen, the loudest line.

title.purpose: Activity row headers in the matrix.

label.purpose: Day headers, tags, button text, structural furniture.

data.purpose: Scores and aligned numerics, tabular figures.

shadows.name: hover-lift
shadows.purpose: Appears on hover/focus of a matrix cell or button. Never at rest.

shadows.name: panel-float
shadows.purpose: The expanded reasoning panel and popovers. The only structural shadow.

motion.name: ease-out-quint
motion.purpose: Default easing for all state transitions.

motion.name: duration-state
motion.purpose: Standard transition duration for hover, focus, and inline expand.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: The single primary action on a screen: the search submit.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { background: oklch(58% 0.11 196); color: oklch(98.5% 0.004 255); font: 500 0.8125rem/1.3 Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; letter-spacing: 0.04em; padding: 10px 18px; border: none; border-radius: 8px; cursor: pointer; transition: background .18s cubic-bezier(.23,1,.32,1), box-shadow .18s cubic-bezier(.23,1,.32,1); } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: oklch(50% 0.11 196); box-shadow: 0 1px 2px oklch(30% 0.04 255 / 0.06), 0 4px 12px oklch(30% 0.04 255 / 0.08); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid oklch(58% 0.11 196); outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Ghost Button
components.css: .ds-btn-ghost { background: oklch(98.5% 0.004 255); color: oklch(24% 0.03 255); font: 500 0.8125rem/1.3 Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; letter-spacing: 0.04em; padding: 10px 16px; border: 1px solid oklch(90% 0.008 255); border-radius: 8px; cursor: pointer; transition: background .18s cubic-bezier(.23,1,.32,1); } .ds-btn-ghost:hover { background: oklch(94% 0.04 196); } .ds-btn-ghost:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid oklch(58% 0.11 196); outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Search Input
components.description: The city search: roomy on the empty state, compact in the results header.
components.css: .ds-input-search { background: oklch(99.5% 0.002 255); color: oklch(24% 0.03 255); font: 400 1rem/1.55 Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; padding: 12px 14px; border: 1px solid oklch(82% 0.012 255); border-radius: 8px; width: 280px; transition: border-color .18s cubic-bezier(.23,1,.32,1), box-shadow .18s cubic-bezier(.23,1,.32,1); } .ds-input-search::placeholder { color: oklch(62% 0.015 255); } .ds-input-search:focus { outline: none; border-color: oklch(58% 0.11 196); box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px oklch(58% 0.11 196 / 0.35); }

components.name: Verdict Cell
components.description: The heart of the matrix: one activity on one day. Favorability tint plus word plus score plus condition glyph.
components.html: Good72
components.css: .ds-cell { display: flex; align-items: baseline; gap: 8px; background: oklch(90% 0.08 196); color: oklch(24% 0.03 255); padding: 10px 12px; border-radius: 8px; cursor: pointer; transition: box-shadow .18s cubic-bezier(.23,1,.32,1); } .ds-cell-word { font: 500 0.8125rem/1.3 Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; letter-spacing: 0.04em; text-transform: uppercase; } .ds-cell-score { margin-left: auto; font: 600 1rem/1.2 Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-feature-settings: 'tnum' 1; } .ds-cell-glyph { width: 16px; height: 16px; color: oklch(48% 0.02 255); } .ds-cell:hover { box-shadow: 0 1px 2px oklch(30% 0.04 255 / 0.06), 0 4px 12px oklch(30% 0.04 255 / 0.08); } .ds-cell:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid oklch(58% 0.11 196); outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Day Chip
components.description: Day header and category tags. Neutral by default, Teal Wash when selected.
components.css: .ds-chip { display: inline-block; background: oklch(96.5% 0.006 255); color: oklch(62% 0.015 255); font: 500 0.8125rem/1.3 Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; letter-spacing: 0.04em; text-transform: uppercase; padding: 4px 8px; border: 1px solid oklch(90% 0.008 255); border-radius: 4px; }

components.name: Top Navigation
components.description: Slim top bar on Raised Surface with a hairline underline.
components.html: Weather to FunHomeAbout
components.css: .ds-nav { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 24px; background: oklch(99.5% 0.002 255); border-bottom: 1px solid oklch(90% 0.008 255); padding: 12px 24px; } .ds-nav-brand { font: 600 1.125rem/1.3 Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; color: oklch(24% 0.03 255); margin-right: auto; } .ds-nav-link { font: 500 0.8125rem/1.3 Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; letter-spacing: 0.04em; text-transform: uppercase; color: oklch(24% 0.03 255); text-decoration: none; padding: 4px 0; transition: color .18s cubic-bezier(.23,1,.32,1); } .ds-nav-link:hover { color: oklch(50% 0.11 196); } .ds-nav-link--active { color: oklch(50% 0.11 196); border-bottom: 2px solid oklch(58% 0.11 196); }

components.name: Matrix Skeleton
components.description: Loading placeholder shaped like a matrix cell. Slow opacity pulse, no spinner.
components.css: .ds-skel { width: 100%; height: 44px; background: oklch(96.5% 0.006 255); border-radius: 8px; animation: ds-pulse 1.6s cubic-bezier(.23,1,.32,1) infinite; } @keyframes ds-pulse { 0%, 100% { opacity: 1; } 50% { opacity: 0.5; } } @media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce) { .ds-skel { animation: none; } }

narrative.overview: This interface is a calm gauge, not a weather portal. A trip planner reads it the way you read a good instrument: the needle points somewhere and you believe it. Every surface is quiet so the one thing that matters, the verdict for an activity on a day, can be loud without shouting. The system is built on tinted near-whites and a deep navy ink, with a single teal doing double duty as both the interactive accent and the language of the verdict. Color is scarce on purpose; when teal appears, it means something. The register is product: familiarity is a feature, density serves comparison, and atmosphere earns its place only where it aids reading.
keyCharacteristics: Light theme, navy-tinted near-whites, never pure white or black.
One teal accent carries both interaction and verdict; it stays under ~10% of any screen.
Verdict is never color alone: always paired with a word and a score.
Flat at rest; shadow appears only in response to state.
Inter throughout, tabular figures for scores.

rules.name: The Scarce Teal Rule
rules.body: Teal covers at most ~10% of any screen. It is reserved for interaction and verdict. It is never a decorative fill, never a header background, never a divider.

rules.name: The Never-Pure Rule
rules.body: No #000, no #fff. Every neutral is tinted toward navy (hue 255, chroma 0.004 to 0.03). Pure values look like a template; the tint is the instrument's finish.

rules.name: The Two-Signal Rule
rules.body: A verdict tint never travels alone. It always ships with a word (Excellent / Good / Fair / Poor / Not viable) and a numeric score, so the verdict survives grayscale and color blindness.

rules.name: The Tabular Score Rule
rules.body: Every score and aligned number uses tabular figures. In a seven-column matrix, proportional digits jitter the grid; tabular digits hold the line.

rules.name: The One Voice Rule
rules.body: No display or script face. The hierarchy is scale and weight, not a second typeface.

rules.name: The Flat-By-Default Rule
rules.body: Surfaces are flat at rest. If a shadow is visible without the user hovering, focusing, or expanding something, it is wrong. Depth at rest comes from the tonal ramp.

rules.name: The Navy-Shadow Rule
rules.body: Shadows are tinted navy (oklch(30% 0.04 255)), never neutral black.

dos: Do keep teal scarce: interaction and verdict only, at most ~10% of a screen.
Do pair every verdict tint with a word and a score, so it survives grayscale and color blindness.
Do tint every neutral toward navy (hue 255, chroma 0.004 to 0.03) and use Navy Ink where you would reach for black.
Do convey resting depth with the three-step tonal ramp (Sunken, Page, Raised); reserve shadow for hover, focus, and transient overlays.
Do use tabular figures for every score and aligned number.
Do label an impossible activity 'Not viable this week' in neutral gray, distinct from a low score.
donts: Don't ship the generic Bootstrap/SaaS template: rounded blue buttons, identical card grids, or hero-metric blocks.
Don't go skeuomorphic: no 3D clouds, glossy sun icons, or cartoon skies.
Don't use neon crypto/gamer darkness: no high-chroma glow, no gradients on black, no dark theme.
Don't paint the verdict with a rainbow of hues; favorability is one teal, varied by chroma.
Don't stack cards or nest a card inside a card.
Don't use a border-left or border-right greater than 1px as a colored accent stripe.
Don't introduce a second typeface; scale and weight carry the hierarchy.
Don't open a modal for the verdict reasoning; expand it inline.
